title: Farm & Feast – A Vanilla-Friendly Farming Modpack
description: Version 1.21.1 I A Proper Vanila+ Modpack I Focused on Farm and Food
body:
Freatures :

✔️ Completely Overhauled World Generation (Biomes o' Plenty, Geophilic)
✔️ Fully Optimized with Shader Support
✔️ Overhauled Stronghold & Fortresses



Farm & Feast is a heavily farming- and food-focused modpack designed for players who love cultivating crops, raising animals, and cooking delicious meals—all while keeping the gameplay close to the vanilla Minecraft experience.

With minimal extra content, this modpack enhances the farming mechanics without overwhelming you with complex machinery or magic. Whether you're expanding your farm, discovering new ingredients, or perfecting your favorite recipes, Farm & Feast offers a relaxing and immersive way to enjoy the simple joys of agriculture in Minecraft.

Perfect for players who want a more in-depth farming experience without straying too far from vanilla



NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT
